panels.description: Medium shot: Mowgli, a young boy with wild black hair and lean, muscular build, stands at the edge of the jungle clearing. He looks back at the dense foliage with a bittersweet expression. The first light of dawn filters through the leaves, creating soft golden highlights on his skin. Lush, detailed jungle background.

bubbles.text: Now, I will go to men. But first I must say farewell to my mother.

panels.description: Medium shot: Inside the dimly lit mouth of the wolf cave. Mowgli is kneeling, his arms wrapped around Mother Wolf's neck, burying his face in her thick grey fur. Father Wolf stands behind them, head lowered in sorrow. In the background, four grey wolf cubs are howling with their heads tilted back. Emotional, high-contrast lighting with cool cave tones.

bubbles.text: And he went to the cave where she lived with Father Wolf, and he cried on her coat, while the four cubs howled miserably.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Mowgli looking into the eyes of Father Wolf. Father Wolf looks regal and wise, his muzzle slightly grizzled. Mowgli's hand rests on the wolf's shoulder. The lighting is warm and intimate, focusing on the bond between the human boy and the wolf. Shallow depth of field with the cave wall blurred in the background.

bubbles.text: Never while we can follow a trail. Come to the foot of the hill when thou art a man, and we will talk to thee.
and we will come into the croplands to play with thee by night.

panels.description: Extreme close-up: Mowgli's face, jaw set in fierce determination. Tears are still visible on his cheeks, but his eyes burn with a hunter's fire. The background is a dark, dramatic blur of the cave entrance. Strong directional light emphasizes the intensity of his vow against the tiger Shere Khan.

bubbles.text: I will surely come, and when I come it will be to lay out Shere Khan's hide upon the Council Rock.
Do not forget me! Tell them in the jungle never to forget me!

panels.description: Wide shot: Mowgli's silhouette walking down a long, grassy hillside away from the viewer. The sun is just breaking over the horizon, painting the sky in vibrant oranges and purples. Far in the distance, the first signs of human cultivation—fences and small huts—are visible. The vastness of the world emphasizes Mowgli's solitude.

bubbles.text: The dawn was beginning to break when Mowgli went down the hillside alone, to meet those mysterious things that are called men.

panels.description: Medium shot: Mowgli walking through tall, dew-covered grass as the sun rises higher. He is singing, his head tilted back slightly. In the distance, a Sambhur deer is seen leaping away from a watering hole. The atmosphere is rhythmic and poetic, with soft lens flares from the morning sun.

bubbles.text: Hunting-Song of the Seeonee Pack... As the dawn was breaking the Sambhur belled Once, twice and again!
To carry the word to the waiting pack. Once, twice and again!

panels.description: Medium close-up: A profile of Mowgli as he reaches the edge of a dirt path leading to the village. His expression is thoughtful and solemn. The background shows the transition from the wild jungle to the structured fields of men. The lighting is bright and clear, symbolizing a new chapter. Cinematic composition.

bubbles.text: Be clean, for the strength of the hunter is known by the gloss of his hide.
Oppress not the cubs of the stranger, but hail them as Brother and Sister. Let him be still and be thought.
